name: ai-geo-by-ivan
description: GEO / AI-search optimization toolkit by Aurelius Ivan Wijaya. A fork of Corey Haines's marketing-skills (CRO, copywriting, SEO, AI SEO, paid ads, ad creative, growth) extended with Ivan's own GEO skills: geo-audit (full AI-search audit + client-ready graph report), index-on-search-engine (register a site/subdomain on Google + Bing), and infinite-run-ai-seo (backlog-driven, self-expanding, self-pacing AI-SEO improvement loop).
